name: custodian-codex-guard
description: A capability firewall for Codex actions, backed by Custodian policy and tamper-evident receipts.

interface.shortDescription: Govern risky coding-agent actions before they execute.
interface.longDescription: Custodian Guard gives Codex an external, fail-closed decision boundary for files, secrets, networks, production, money, and policy—with value-free HMAC-chained receipts.
defaultPrompt: Show how Custodian governs this repository.
Evaluate my next risky action before running it.
Verify the Codex Guard receipt chain.
